scripts.build: pnpm --filter @rag-next/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @rag-next/api build && pnpm --filter @rag-next/worker build && pnpm --filter @rag-next/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @rag-next/shared-types lint && pnpm --filter @rag-next/api lint && pnpm --filter @rag-next/worker lint && pnpm --filter @rag-next/web lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @rag-next/shared-types test && pnpm --filter @rag-next/api test && pnpm --filter @rag-next/worker test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @rag-next/shared-types typecheck && pnpm --filter @rag-next/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @rag-next/worker typecheck && pnpm --filter @rag-next/web typecheck
